scripts.build: npm run build:peggy && npm run build:ui && tsc && cp src/provenance-parser.generated.js dist/ && git rev-parse --short HEAD > dist/commit.txt 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test:base: node scripts/tests/test-pure-functions.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-provenance-parser.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-provenance-peg.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-inscription-parser.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-overlay-scoring.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-lru-cache.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-origin-validation.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-text-query-dsl.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-usage-stats-perinput.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-inflight-cache.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-provenance-enrichment-store.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-enrichment-review-html.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-provenance-change-report.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-response-shape.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-warnings-rendering.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-audit-name-collision.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:base && node scripts/tests/test-viewer-build.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-vocabdb-fixture.mjs
scripts.test:track2: node scripts/tests/test-title-variants.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-parent-grouping.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-related-objects.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-track2-mcp.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-creator-vocabid.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-attribution-same-row.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-attribution-qualifiers.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-stats-provenance-plan.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-stats-unfiltered-provenance-plan.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-stats-field-shape-plan.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-collection-stats-tier1.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-collection-stats-tier2.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-collection-stats-tier3.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-runtime-additions.mjs
